Title: AI Detector - Advanced AI Checker for ChatGPT, GPT-5 & Gemini

URL Source: https://quillbot.com/ai-content-detector

Markdown Content:
## AI Detector by QuillBot

Paste your text below to check whether it was written by AI. Our AI detector is trained to detect content generated by GPT-5, Gemini, Claude, Llama, and more.

AI Detector by QuillBot

Paste your text below to check whether it was written by AI. Our AI detector is trained to detect content generated by GPT-5, Gemini, Claude, Llama, and more.

0 Words

## What is an AI Detector?

An AI detector is a tool designed to analyze written content and identify whether it was created by a human or generated by artificial intelligence. It can detect content from major models, including ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Llama, and accurately distinguish between fully AI-generated text and content that has been refined using assistive writing tools.

AI detectors are widely used by educators, businesses, publishers, and content creators to verify originality, protect content quality, and promote transparency. Supporting all major languages, our AI Checker provides detailed feedback, helping users quickly verify the authenticity of content in seconds.

## More clarity, less confusion with QuillBot's AI Detector

Paraphrasing and grammar checking tools are ethical uses of AI writing technology. They help millions of non-native English speakers and writers refine their text and express their ideas fluently.

But most AI detectors can’t tell the difference between text that’s been created with generative AI tools—such as ChatGPT, GPT5, GPT4, GPT3, Gemini, Llama, Claude and others—and text that’s been refined using assistive tools. This leads to false positives and

[cultural bias](https://quillbot.com/blog/quillbot-tools/cultural-bias-and-ai-detection/)
.

So we built a more reliable AI detector.

## How to use QuillBot’s AI Detector

### Add content

**Input text:** Upload or paste your text into the AI Detector.

**Select language:** Choose English, French, German, or Spanish.

**Check length:**Make sure your text is at least 80 words.

### Run scan

**Analyze text:** Press the “Detect AI” button at the bottom of the tool.

**Receive report:** Get detailed results in just a few seconds.

**Review feedback:** Receive a total score and line-by-line report.

### Edit content

**Interpret results:** Review any highlighted sections of text.

**Revise text:** Rewrite any AI-generated sections if needed.

**Re-scan:**Run another scan to double-check your revisions.

[Get certified](https://quillbot.com/content-certification)

## Why choose QuillBot's AI Detector

Our AI detector doesn’t just identify text generated by tools like ChatGPT, GPT-4, GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and other large language models. It also detects text refined with paraphrasers or grammar checkers-including our own-because it’s continuously trained on evolving AI text patterns. If your content is flagged as AI-generated, you can revise it for a more natural tone or use our [Humanize AI](https://quillbot.com/ai-humanizer)tool to make your writing sound more authentic and human.

Here's what else sets our AI checker apart.

### Detailed analysis

Know exactly which part of the text appears to be AI-generated

### High accuracy

Advanced models for highly accurate results

### Downloadable reports

Download in-depth PDF reports for every detection

### Multilingual support

Supports all languages with accurate detection

### Fast

Receive your AI detection report within seconds

## The Technology Behind QuillBot’s AI Detector

QuillBot’s AI Detector analyzes patterns to estimate the likelihood that a text is human written or AI generated. Instead of flagging individual words, our detector notices structural signals like repetition, generic language, and lack of variation in tone.

Our detector works because it is trained on large sets of human- and AI-written texts generated using models like GPT-4, GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and other modern large language models. It uses metrics such as perplexity (how predictable the text is) and burstiness (how much sentence length varies) to identify writing patterns typical of machines.

When the result is unclear, our model tends to classify texts as human written, which reduces false positives. For the most accurate results, analyze your entire text at once, and make sure it meets the length requirement. Always interpret results in light of your own knowledge.

For every text, you’ll get a probability score that suggests its likely source. As with any AI detector, this score is not a guarantee, but it is a useful signal when authorship matters.

### QuillBot's AI Detector for mobile

Conveniently access our AI Detector as part of our mobile app for Apple or Android. Use QuillBot’s AI Detector to quickly identify AI-generated or AI-refined text. Plus, use our included Paraphraser, Translator and Grammar Checker to perfect your writing all in one place.

## An AI detector that’s perfect for any project

Slide 1 of 4

### Work projects

The last thing you want is to turn something in to your boss that wasn’t created by you. Use our AI Checker to update your project with your original work.

### Blog posts

Make sure your content reaches its audience. Algorithms will penalize your text if it contains too much AI. Originality sets you apart, grows your following, and builds trust.

### Research papers

Important papers you write for school or work should let your original writing shine. With QuillBot’s AI Detector, you can feel confident that the text you turn in meets your standards of ethical AI usage.

![Image 12: AI Detector for students](https://assets.quillbot.com/pageq/QBWebapp/ai-detector-class-assignments-ai-refined-light-en.png)

### Class assignments

Take the stress out of analyzing your students' work with our AI checker for teachers. By clearly distinguishing between AI-generated and AI-refined text, you can avoid false positives and biases against non-native English students who use writing tools ethically.

Do it all with QuillBot
